name: HuggingFace Hub API
description: HuggingFace Hub API — query model cards, metadata, tags, and README content for AI models

connector.description: HuggingFace Hub model metadata and model card API with Bearer token auth

endpoints.name: get-model
endpoints.description: Get model card metadata by model ID (e.g. stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0)

endpoints.name: search-models
endpoints.description: Search models by query and/or pipeline tag

endpoints.name: list-by-pipeline
endpoints.description: List models filtered by pipeline tag (e.g. text-to-image, text-generation)
